payload.answer: This appears to be an ephemeral current-weather statement, not a durable memory to save.
repair_options: Do not store this as a durable memory.
If you want to keep it, record it separately as a time-bound observation about today's weather.
Ask the user whether they want this treated as a temporary note rather than a lasting memory.
